photo1.context: Reaching the historic 50th ODI century at Wankhede Stadium in the World Cup semi-final vs New Zealand.
photo1.jersey: 2023 World Cup India Blue with tricolor stripes on shoulders.
photo1.celebrationStyle: Kneeling on the grass, helmet off, head tilted back looking at the sky in pure gratitude.
photo1.emotion: Deep relief, spiritual gratitude, tears of joy, absolute ecstasy.
photo1.visualImpact: Epic, iconic, central visual weight. Captures the ultimate peak of ODI batting history.
photo1.composition: Centered vertical profile crop with a beautifully blurred Wankhede crowd backdrop.
photo1.storytelling: Surpassing Sachin Tendulkar's long-standing record of 49 ODI centuries under maximum pressure.

photo2.context: Completing a masterclass run chase in the 2023 ICC World Cup.
photo2.jersey: 2023 World Cup India Blue showing 'VIRAT 18' nameplate in high-contrast orange.
photo2.celebrationStyle: Walking back facing away from the camera, holding bat aloft in left hand, helmet in right.
photo2.emotion: Validation, quiet authority, deep-seated pride, legacy.
photo2.visualImpact: Extremely strong graphic composition focusing on the legendary number 18 silhouette.
photo2.composition: Portrait crop from behind, looking out at the cheering stadium stands.
photo2.storytelling: The silhouette of the Chase Master leaving the arena after executing a surgical victory.

photo3.context: Completing a critical century during the 2023 World Cup campaign.
photo3.jersey: 2023 World Cup India Blue with orange stripes on collar.
photo3.celebrationStyle: Arms spread wide in crucifix pose, MRF bat raised, roaring to the crowd.
photo3.emotion: Intense roar, theatrical triumph, complete dominance.
photo3.visualImpact: Dynamic, wide scaling, showing the sheer physical fire and emotional passion of the King.
photo3.composition: Wide medium crop, highlighting chest-up details and wide arm extension.
photo3.storytelling: Virat Kohli asserting his supreme limited-overs kingdom in front of a roaring home crowd.

photo4.context: Celebrating a crucial ODI century and match-defining boundary.
photo4.celebrationStyle: Leaping high in the air with fist pumped, body tensed with energy, bat held low.
photo4.emotion: Electric joy, raw athletic ecstasy, aggressive passion.
photo4.visualImpact: High-velocity action capture of Kohli suspended in mid-air.
photo4.composition: Dynamic vertical diagonal jump line, with stadium colors filling the frame.
photo4.storytelling: The absolute hunger and kinetic intensity Kohli brings to limited-overs cricket.

photo5.context: Kissing the silverware after completing a major ICC limited-overs tournament triumph.
photo5.jersey: India training/zip jacket with ICC Champions Trophy and BCCI medals.
photo5.celebrationStyle: Kissing the tall silver ICC trophy with closed eyes, holding it with both hands.
photo5.emotion: Tender affection, fulfillment, satisfaction, ultimate victory.
photo5.visualImpact: Warm cinematic lighting reflecting off the silver trophy profile.
photo5.composition: Tight portrait close-up profile, emphasizing the connection between the player and the prize.
photo5.storytelling: Lifting global ICC silverware as proof of ODI tournament dominance.
